basic_details.job_title: SBI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 7150 Posts
basic_details.short_information: SBI Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 7150 new vacancies for Apprentice posts. Candidates can apply online only from 19.05.2026 to 08.06.2026 through SBI website sbi.bank.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Central Recruitment & Promotion Department (CRPD), State Bank of India
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via NAPS portal + SBI website)

age_limit.age_details: To be notified after Online Written Examination result

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation from a recognized University / Institute.

selection_process: Online Written Test + Test of Local Language + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online; no other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates must first mandatorily register on the NAPS portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) and read the detailed guidelines on https://bfsissc.com before applying online through the SBI website.
seo_tags: State Bank of India Apprentice Recruitment 2026
